description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine Docker image. Add a pages job (named pages) that runs in the default stage, executes the shell commands 'apk update && apk add doxygen', then 'doxygen doxygen/Doxyfile', then 'mv doxygen/documentation/html/ public/', publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, and is limited to the master branch only.
